g.text: FABIO value-added per item for Gambia, The (GMB); items below 3% max |share| of WB across years are grouped
as "Other". Primary (ISIC-A) row: black line = WB ag VA, grey dashed = FABIO-comparable WB (WB minus seeds
and forestry), points coloured by forestry source (see legend). Rows: primary (ISIC-A) vs processing
FABIO value-added [EXIOBASE] vs World Bank agricultural value-added — Gambia, The (GMB)
